summary: Frontend testing for Weekly Lesson Planner PDF Export P0 issue. All requirements PASSED: PDF Print Preview displays all content on ONE landscape page without overflow, DOK Levels row shows full descriptions for all 4 levels, Activities row shows all 9 activities, Materials row shows all 7 materials, 'Other' notes feature implemented correctly, Page 2 (Standards) displays as separate page.

issues: Minor: React hydration warnings in console about <th>/<td> nesting with <span> elements - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PlanPrintView.js uses flexbox layout correctly: page container with flex-direction:column, header/info sections with flex-shrink:0, table-wrapper with flex:1
DOK Levels row (lines 522-543) shows full descriptions for all 4 levels as required
Activities row (lines 545-563) shows all 9 activities with 'Other' notes support (lines 555-557)
Materials row (lines 565-583) shows all 7 materials with 'Other' notes support (lines 575-577)
Page dimensions verified: 1056px x 816px (landscape letter at 96dpi)
Table dimensions: 1037px x 629px - fits within page without overflow
test_credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword (JWT token used for authentication)
seed_data_creation: Created test plan 'Test Other Notes Unit' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Lesson Planner PDF export P0 issue is RESOLVED. All content fits on ONE landscape page. DOK Levels show full descriptions. Activities (9) and Materials (7) rows display correctly. 'Other' notes feature works when checked with notes. Page 2 (Standards) is separate page.

elements_verified.info_row: Unit, Story, Teacher, Grade, Date (MM/DD/YYYY format)
elements_verified.skills_box: Skills of the week listed (4 items)

dok_levels_row.level1: Level 1: Memory Thought (Knowledge in or the same way as learned)
dok_levels_row.level2: Level 2: Processing (Requires some basic mental reasoning, something beyond memory)
dok_levels_row.level3: Level 3: Thinking Strategic (Demonstrate knowledge based on complex and abstract cognitive demand)
dok_levels_row.level4: Level 4: Thinking Thought Extended (extends knowledge to broader contexts)

elements_verified.overflow: NONE - all content fits on page 1
